title: Fix VlProcess argument inconsistent across virtual member functions

features.name: virtual function with inheritance and out-parameter
features.description: Code should include a base class with a virtual function that has an out-parameter return, and a derived class that overrides it with a different signature

features.name: virtual member function with ref return parameter
features.description: Code should include a virtual member function with a reference output parameter that returns a string or object
features.snippet: virtual void __VnoInFunc_get_type_name(VlProcessRef vlProcess, Syms* __restrict vlSymsp, output string s);
